No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3), develops language skills for work (4.4), and fosters cultural understanding and international perspective (4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly aims to develop 'language skills required for work' and 'professional competitiveness', directly supporting Target 8.5 (decent work).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course fosters 'international mobility', which indirectly supports Target 10.7 by facilitating the orderly movement of people.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Fostering 'understanding [of] Japanese society and history culture' indirectly contributes to Target 11.4 by promoting cultural heritage appreciation.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' and use '正版書籍' (genuine books) aligns with ethical consumption and awareness for sustainable lifestyles (Target 12.8).

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to marine life.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' promotes the rule of law (16.3). Cultural understanding also indirectly fosters peace.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing 'international perspective' and 'international mobility' provides foundational skills for international cooperation and partnerships (17.6, 17.16).
